positive: A symmetrical, neo-art nouveau illustration of bioluminescent fantasy flora and glowing forest mushrooms, centered composition. The primary subjects feature strong, clean silhouettes against a midnight blue background. Use rich bioluminescent accents of teal, emerald green, and soft gold. Style must be highly detailed, suitable for screen printing and apparel transfer, vector quality, high contrast, and featuring elegant negative space.
